personality: Affable, shrewd, always appraising. Speaks with practiced charm and an eye on profit.

greetingPool.text: Fine goods from every corner of the realm! Have a look, friend.
I deal in quality, not quantity. Tell me what you seek and I shall name a fair price.
Business has been slow on the road of late. Perhaps you have coin to spare?

idlePool.text: These Ravensgate silks are worth triple once you reach the northern towns. Location is everything.
A merchant who stops counting coin is a merchant who will soon have none to count.
